core_problem.notes: The paper explicitly targets machine translation (WMT 2014 En-De and En-Fr) and more generally sequence transduction/sequence modeling tasks.

proposed_method.notes: The authors introduce the Transformer architecture, an attention-only encoder-decoder using self-attention, multi-head attention and positional encodings.

baselines.notes: The paper explicitly lists ByteNet, ConvS2S, and GNMT+RL as baselines compared against.

datasets.notes: WMT 2014 En-De and En-Fr are explicitly used; the paper also applies the model to English constituency parsing but does not name the specific parsing corpus in the provided text.

evaluation_metrics.notes: The paper reports BLEU scores on WMT 2014 benchmarks as the primary evaluation metric.

application_domain.notes: The work is in NLP, focusing on machine translation and demonstrating applicability to syntactic (constituency) parsing.
